content: {"perspective": "Regulatory", "question": "What formal regulatory opinions, guidance documents, or enforcement actions have the FDA, EMA, EFSA, or Health Canada issued regarding intermittent fasting as a therapeutic or preventive intervention for metabolic syndrome, and how do they treat health claims made by commercial IF apps and subscription programs?", "search_queries": ["FDA intermittent fasting health claim dietary guidance statement draft guidance 2024", "EFSA Article 13 Article 14 intermittent fasting health claim substantiation panel opinion", "Health Canada therapeutic claim intermittent fasting dietary intervention regulation", "FDA warning letter dietary intervention health claim unapproved therapeutic intermittent fasting app", "EMA position therapeutic lifestyle intervention metabolic syndrome dietary fasting regulatory"]}
